testcase.name: test_generate_slots_for_enabled_day
testcase.failure: tests/test_availability.py:345: in test_generate_slots_for_enabled_day assert len(slots) == 8 E AssertionError: assert 6 == 8 E + where 6 = len([{'duration_minutes': 60, 'end_time': '2026-01-19T10:00:00Z', 'start_time': '2026-01-19T09:00:00Z'}, {'duration_minutes': 60, 'end_time': '2026-01-19T12:00:00Z', 'start_time': '2026-01-19T11:00:00Z'}, {'duration_minutes': 60, 'end_time': '2026-01-19T13:00:00Z', 'start_time': '2026-01-19T12:00:00Z'}, {'duration_minutes': 60, 'end_time': '2026-01-19T14:00:00Z', 'start_time': '2026-01-19T13:00:00Z'}, {'duration_minutes': 60, 'end_time': '2026-01-19T15:00:00Z', 'start_time': '2026-01-19T14:00:00Z'}, {'duration_minutes': 60, 'end_time': '2026-01-19T17:00:00Z', 'start_time': '2026-01-19T16:00:00Z'}])

testcase.name: test_slots_with_buffer_time
testcase.failure: tests/test_availability.py:422: in test_slots_with_buffer_time assert len(slots) >= 6 E AssertionError: assert 4 >= 6 E + where 4 = len([{'duration_minutes': 60, 'end_time': '2026-01-19T10:00:00Z', 'start_time': '2026-01-19T09:00:00Z'}, {'duration_minutes': 60, 'end_time': '2026-01-19T12:30:00Z', 'start_time': '2026-01-19T11:30:00Z'}, {'duration_minutes': 60, 'end_time': '2026-01-19T13:45:00Z', 'start_time': '2026-01-19T12:45:00Z'}, {'duration_minutes': 60, 'end_time': '2026-01-19T15:00:00Z', 'start_time': '2026-01-19T14:00:00Z'}])

testcase.name: test_slots_with_different_session_duration
testcase.failure: tests/test_availability.py:462: in test_slots_with_different_session_duration assert len(slots) == 10 E AssertionError: assert 6 == 10 E + where 6 = len([{'duration_minutes': 45, 'end_time': '2026-01-19T09:45:00Z', 'start_time': '2026-01-19T09:00:00Z'}, {'duration_minutes': 45, 'end_time': '2026-01-19T12:00:00Z', 'start_time': '2026-01-19T11:15:00Z'}, {'duration_minutes': 45, 'end_time': '2026-01-19T12:45:00Z', 'start_time': '2026-01-19T12:00:00Z'}, {'duration_minutes': 45, 'end_time': '2026-01-19T13:30:00Z', 'start_time': '2026-01-19T12:45:00Z'}, {'duration_minutes': 45, 'end_time': '2026-01-19T14:15:00Z', 'start_time': '2026-01-19T13:30:00Z'}, {'duration_minutes': 45, 'end_time': '2026-01-19T15:00:00Z', 'start_time': '2026-01-19T14:15:00Z'}])

testcase.name: test_blocked_time_removes_slots
testcase.failure:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:976: in json return complexjson.loads(self.text, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/__init__.py:346: in loads return _default_decoder.decode(s) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:337: in decode obj, end = self.raw_decode(s, idx=_w(s, 0).end()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:355: in raw_decode raise JSONDecodeError("Expecting value", s, err.value) from None E json.decoder.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: tests/test_availability.py:554: in test_blocked_time_removes_slots after_slots = len(after_response.json()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:980: in json raise RequestsJSONDecodeError(e.msg, e.doc, e.pos) E requests.exceptions.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)
